invariants.R1: Theta-reverse correctness: reverse(d) selects only Theta indices whose forward expansion contains d.
invariants.D1: BIP-39 determinism: digits->entropy->bits->indices->seed is a pure function.

mappings.digit_map: Defined in implementation; must be total over all glyphs used in forward decoding.
mappings.theta_map: Defined in implementation; Theta indices 0..T map to glyphs.
